extra.reason: Implemented the V1 local-first foundation: Rust CLI/workspace, SQLite storage, four local importers, pricing snapshot/overrides, SSH remote configuration with read-only discovery, embedded React/Vite dashboard, tests, validation, and turn documentation. Follow-up remote import and fixture hardening are tracked separately.

Fixed Codex token_count accounting by reading payload.info.last_token_usage as the event increment, splitting cached input from non-cached input for Codex rows, and adding regression coverage. Validation: cargo test -p dirtydash; temp import produced Codex 30d base-rate estimate .05.
